summary: Testing for Trend Syria app improvements to the stores section on the Food page. Tested: 1) Horizontal carousel for stores (left-only scroll in RTL), 2) 'View All' button navigation, 3) New AllFoodStoresPage at /food/stores, 4) Search functionality, 5) Sort options (rating, delivery_time, min_order), 6) Store card click navigation, 7) Back navigation and scroll restoration. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: delivery_time field has inconsistent types - some stores have string format '30-45' while others have integer. Frontend handles this correctly but data should be normalized.

critical_code_review_comments: StoresCarousel component (lines 128-183) correctly implements horizontal scroll with one-way restriction for RTL layout
AllFoodStoresPage properly fetches and displays all stores with search and sort functionality
Route /food/stores correctly added in App.js and protected by FoodRoute wrapper
ScrollContext provides scroll restoration for back navigation - working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All navigation flows, search, sort, and click interactions working

test_credentials.note: No authentication required for viewing stores

context_for_next_testing_agent: Food stores section testing complete. StoresCarousel changed from 2x2 grid to horizontal carousel. New page AllFoodStoresPage at /food/stores. localStorage must have 'food_delivery_city' = 'دمشق' to bypass city selector modal. All tested: navigation /food → /food/stores, search, sort (rating/delivery_time/min_order), store card clicks, back navigation with scroll restoration.

tests: Search input works - filters stores by name/description
Back navigation from /food/stores to /food restores scroll position
